Brian M. Sanders, Esq. of ERICKSEN, ARBUTHNOT 510/832-7770, for defendant Cesar Appolinar Blancas moving to set aside default and default judgment

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT CESAR Appolinar BLANCAS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT -- granted on the condition that defendant to deliver the answer (deemed the proposed answer) to the court on or before 8/8/03.
